raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The aging, undocumented population in California is increasing.",
    "Many immigrant seniors in California have no retirement despite years of working in the country.",
    "The Cash Assistance Program for Immigrants (CAPI) is designed to provide monthly cash benefits to qualified aged, blind, and disabled immigrants.",
    "The CAPI program leaves thousands of undocumented seniors and disabled individuals without support for housing, medicine, and necessities.",
    "California is home to an estimated 17,000 undocumented seniors aged 65 and older.",
    "The number of undocumented seniors in California is expected to rise in the coming years.",
    "Many undocumented seniors have contributed to state benefit programs but do not qualify for retirement benefits.",
    "Expanding CAPI would allow undocumented persons to access cash assistance regardless of their immigration status."
  ]
}
```
